sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115343" key="yammi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαμμ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115343.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">from sand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δόρπος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.551</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="2" id="n115343.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀριθμός</foreign>) name of a treatise (<title_ TEIform="title">Arenarius</title_>) by Archimedes. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n115343.2" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὗς</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
